commands.review_summary:
This PR changes Telegram sendChatAction 401 classification to check structured `error_code` before the unauthorized-text fallback and adds a regression test for a 429 `retry_after=401` false positive.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +39. Total +47 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows a structured 429 whose rendered message contains `401` can match the broad 401 classifier before transient handling; I did not run the repro in this read-only review.
